characters.name: Baby Crocodiles
characters.description: Baby CrocodilesBackground informationFirst Appearance"The Golden Egg" (cameo)Latest Appearance"Treasure Chest Switcheroo"VoiceDee Bradley Baker(uncredited)Character informationOccupationCrocodileAffiliationsNeutralGoalTo eat Captain HookHomeNever LandRelativesTick-Tock the Crocodile, each otherAlliesTick-Tock the Crocodile, each otherEnemiesCaptain Hook,Mr. Smee,Sharky,BonesLikesTaste of Captain HookDislikesCaptain Hook escapingWeaponsTeeth,clawsFateLast seen attacking Captain Hook as he flees deeper into the Never Land Jungle[Source]TheBaby Crocodilesare minor characters from theDisney Junioranimated series,Jake and the Never Land Pirates. They are a small group of baby crocodiles that lives onNever LandTheir vocal effects are provided byDee Bradley Baker. A Baby Croc makes a brief appearance as a golden egg at the end of the episode "The Golden Egg" After failing to get away with another treasure thanks to Jake and his crew intervening yet againCaptain Hooksulk on the beach withMr. Smee. Suddenly Hook uncovers a golden egg within the sand. Smee warns Hook not to touch it, but Hook ignores Smee's warning, just as Smee feared the egg was crocodile egg. Much to Captain Hook shock when he turns to seeTick-Tock the Crocodilestanding over him with a not amused look on his face. Captain Hook screams in terror as he flees still holding onto the golden egg, with Tick-Tock Croc in pursuit as he chase Hook across the beach into theNever Land Jungle. The Baby Crocodiles reappear in the episode "Treasure Chest Switcheroo"Jakeand his crew discover that Captain Hook, Mr. Smee,Sharky, andBoneshave taken theirTeam Treasure Chestwhere they store all theirgold doubloonsand flee to Never Land. After many failed attempts to force the Team Treasure Chest open, Hook and his crew lose the chest to Jake and his crew who fly back toPirate Island, with their treasure.Captain Hook sulks after being bested by Jake and his crew and losing the treasure, but Mr. Smee, Sharky, and Bones attempt to cheer Hook up with their own treasure chest full of golden eggs.Captain Hook was very moved by his crews gesture, but this is short lived as the eggs quickly hatch into baby crocodiles who eagerly look at Hook with hungry glares as they mimic Tick-Tock Croc's googly eye gesture as they chirp in rhythm,in a similar fashion to the ticking of theclockin Tick-Tock's belly.Captain Hook screams in a panic as he flees, the baby crocodiles quickly give chase after the captain, snapping at him off-screen.Hook screams for Smee to save him as the baby crocodiles bite into him as he flees deeper into the Never Land Jungle.

Not much is currently known about the Baby Ice Dragons, or how they were frozen, but they were later mistaken for a treasure hidden deep within the Cave of Ice.Queen Isabellaattempted to uncover the treasure of the Valley of Ice, but had to face the icy fury of their mother. characters.name: Baby Tiki Trees
characters.description: Baby Tiki TreesBackground informationFirst Appearance"Tiki Tree Luau!"VoiceDee Bradley BakerCharacter informationOther namesTiny TikisBaby TikisWee OnesLittle SaplingsForest MoppetsMoppetsAffiliationsGoodHomeTiki ForestinNever LandAlliesTiki Trees,Jake,Izzy,Cubby,Skully,Captain Hook,Mr. Smee,Sharky,BonesEnemiesCaptain Hook,Mr. Smee,Sharky,Bones(all temporarily),LikesPlaying,bottle of warm tree sap,pinecone pacifiers[Source] TheBaby Tiki Treesare minor characters that appear in theDisney Junioranimated series,Jake and the Never Land Pirates. They our young anthropomorphic Tiki Trees that live in the section ofNever Landknown asTiki Forest. Their vocal effects are provided byDee Bradley Baker. The Baby Tiki Trees first appeared in the episode "Tiki Tree Luau!,"Jakeand his crew are invited to attend the Tiki Tree Luau to welcome spring.Jake and his crew soon arrive at Tiki Forest, where they are greeted by the lead Tiki Tree. While the Tiki Trees finish preparing for the party, Jake and his crew were entrusted in watching the Baby Tiki Trees at the nursery.Meanwhile,Captain Hookand his crew soon arrives, witnessing Jake and his crew heading for the nursery. Hook refused to be beaten to another treasure by the puny pirates. WhileIzzyread to the Baby Tiki Trees, Jake,CubbyandSkullynotice four strange Baby Tiki Trees enter the nursery, acting suspicious. Jake and his friends soon uncover it was Hook and his crew disguised as Baby Tiki Trees. After a few comical mishaps, Captain Hook revealed himself to the young pirates, demanding what ever treasure the Tiki Trees may be hiding, but Jake and his crew inform the greedy captain that isn't any treasure. Furious that he went through that whole ordeal for nothing, Hook storms off with his bumbling crew behind, unaware that the Baby Tiki Trees followed.As Hook and his crew try to cross a stone bridge to return back to theJolly Roger, the pirates soon discover that the Baby Tiki Trees have followed them. Hook desperately shoos the young Tiki Trees away, but it was too late. The combined weight of the Baby Tiki Trees causes the stone bridge to collapse underneath, sending Hook, his crew, and Baby Tiki Trees plummeting. Fortunately, Jake and crew soon arrive. Quickly, Izzy uses herpixie dustto rescue everyone. With the danger over with, Jake and Hook's crew soon return the Baby Tikis back to Tiki Forest to enjoy the Tiki Tree Luau.

characters.name: Baron Buddybop
characters.description: Baron BuddybopBackground informationFirst Appearance"Treasure Tunnel Trouble"VoiceDee Bradley BakerCharacter informationOccupationThe leader or the BuddybopsAffiliationsGoodHomeNever LandAlliesTheBuddybops,Bones,Jake,Izzy,Cubby,Skully,EnemiesCaptain Hook,Mr. Smee,SharkyLikesPlaying Buddybop Ball,  protecting the golden Buddybop treasureDislikesCaptain Hook[Source] TheBaron Buddybopis a minor character in theDisney Junioranimated seriesJake and the Never Land Pirates. He is a short anthropomorphic mammalian like creature known as aBuddybopand the leader of his people living onNever Land. His vocal effects are provided byDee Bradley Baker. The Baron Buddybop first appeared in the episode "Treasure Tunnel Trouble",Boneswas enjoying a game of Buddybop Ball with the Buddybops, Jake and his crew. However, the game is cut short whenCaptain Hooksoon learns that Bones has been taking a break from his pirate task aboard theJolly Rogerin favor of playing silly games. Furious at this Hook was determined to put end to Bones foolishness but soon learns that Buddybops have a hoard of golden orbs within their underground home. The Baron Buddybop guides Bones, Jake, and his crew through the twists and turns of his kingdom to make sure Hook doesn't try to steal the Buddybop's treasure. The Baron Buddybop is last seen thanking Bones, Jake and his crew for saving the treasure and preventing Captain Hook from causing trouble and welcomes them to return anytime for another game of Buddybop Ball whenever they like.

characters.name: Bear
characters.description: The BearBackground informationFirst Appearance"Captain Hook's Last Stand!"VoiceDee Bradley BakerCharacter informationOther namesMr. Bear (referred to by Michael)AffiliationsNeutral/GoodHomeGreen Grove GulchwithinNever LandAlliesMichael Darling,Cubby,Skully,Tinker BellEnemiesMichael Darling,Cubby,Skully,Tinker Bell(all formerly),Sharky,BonesLikesSleepingDislikesBeing woken from his slumber, trespassersPowers and abilitiesBrute strengthWeaponsTeeth and clawsFateIs last seen scaring Sharky and Bones away.Quote[roars][Source]TheBearis a minor character in theDisney Junioranimated series,Jake and the Never Land Pirates. He is a large brown bear who lives inGreen Grove Gulch, deep withinNever Land. His vocal effect are provided byDee Bradley Baker.  The Bear first appeared in the series finale, "Captain Hook's Last Stand!". WhenCaptain HookturnsPeter Panto stone with the power of theDoom Stone,Captain Jakeand his crew get help from Darling siblings to find the magic items needed to rescue their petrified friend.Michael Darling,Cubby,SkullyandTinker Bellhead to Green Grove Gulch to find the magical mud, which will help break the spell. Unknown to the group,SharkyandBoneswere spying on them in order to locate the petrified Peter for Hook. Captain Hook soon arrives at the gulch to learn if his crew had any luck locating Pan. Seeing that his crew had poor luck finding Peter, he decides to make the young heroes reveal his location by force, ordering Sharky and Bones to wake a nearby sleeping bear, luring it towards Michael and Cubby. Hook orders Michael and Cubby to reveal the location of Pan is hiding and he will stop the bear from attacking them, but Michael and Cubby refused to betray their friend. Furious, Captain Hook soon leaves the bear to deal with Michael and the others to continue his search for Peter Pan. As the bear crept closer, Cubby, Skully and Tinker Bell prepared for the worse, but much to their surprise, Michael was able to befriend the bear, who lets them leave with the magical mud of Green Grove Gulch. The Bear is last seen scaring Sharky and Bones away.

characters.name: Beardini the Pirate Magician
characters.description: Beardini the Pirate MagicianBackground informationFirst Appearance"The Remarkable Beardini!"Latest Appearance"Tales of Captain Buzzard"VoiceSteve ValentineCharacter informationOther namesPirate MagicianThe Remarkable BeardiniMagical master Beardini (referred by Cubby)OccupationPirate MagicianAffiliationsNeutral, later GoodGoalTo retrieve hisInvisibility RingHomePirate Magician's LairinNever LandAlliesJake,Izzy,Cubby,SkullyEnemiesCaptain Hook,Mr. SmeeLikesMagic,performing in front of othersDislikesDislike it when he fails at performing a trick,when trespassers steal his secretsPowers and abilitiesMagic spells,TeleportingWeaponsMagic WandQuoteIt's showtime for Beardini![Source] Beardini the Pirate Magicianis a recurring character from theDisney Junioranimated series,Jake and the Never Land Pirates.  He is a legendary pirate magician who lives on Never Land. He is voiced bySteve Valentine. Beardini is quite known for his skill as a magician. However, Beardini seems to have disappeared from Never Land for many years as revealed byCaptain Hookin the episode "Invisible Jake". However, it wouldn't be until the season four episode "The Remarkable Beardini!" reveals years later that Beardini didn't leave but was merely confined in a trick treasure chest with swords going through it as part of a new trick he was trying to perfect. But in the end, Beardini couldn't get out due to not reading the instructions to his new magical apparatus.

characters.name: Big Bug
characters.description: Big BugBackground informationFirst Appearance"The Race to Never Peak!"VoiceDee Bradley BakerCharacter informationAffiliationsNeutralGoalTo keep trespassers away from its territoryHomeBig Bug ValleywithinNever LandEnemiesJake,Izzy,Cubby,Skully,Nibs,Captain Hook,Mr. SmeeLikesSleeping, keeping trespassers away from its territoryDislikesBeing woken from his slumber,trespassers, loud noisesWeaponsBrute strength[Source] TheBig Bugis a minor character from theDisney Junioranimated series,Jake and the Never Land Pirates. Its a ferocious giant insect that lives inBig Bug Valley. His vocal effect are provided byDee Bradley Baker. The Big Bug first appeared in the episode "The Race to Never Peak!". After Captain Hook swipesJakeand the crewssoccer balland flees toNever Land. Jake and the crew must find their soccer ball onNever Peak Mountain, where it ended up after Hook kicked it. Big Bug Valley was the first location that both pirate crews had to pass to reach Never Peak. Hook andMr. Smeestumble into the Big Bug, sleeping within the path. Hook quickly cowers behind Smee, when they overhear Jake and the crew on their trail. Hook decides to wake the Big Bug, with a fallen coconut so it will chase Jake and friends back to the beach, giving him and Smee a huge lead to Never Peak Mountain. But Hook did not count on Jake and his companions bravery, as the young pirates stood their ground and roared back at the Big Bug, sending it fleeing away so Jake and his crew can safely pass and catch up to Hook.The Big Bug makes a brief reappearance as Jake and his crew fly over it, as they make there way back toPirate Island, after retrieving their soccer ball from the top of Never Peak Mountain.

He's aNever Landfirefly andCubby's pet. His vocal effects are provided byDee Bradley Baker. Brightly first appeared in the episode "The Golden Twilight Treasure!" He is a friend ofJakeand his crew.Izzyis the one who named him Brightly because when he is happy he shines brightly. He's a large brown scaled crocodile that lives inCrocodile CreekonNever Land. His vocal effects are provided byDee Bradley Baker. The Brown Crocodile first appeared in the episode "Captain Hook's Crocodile Crew", After retrieving a large rock formation resembling hismotherCaptain Hookorders his crew to follow him across the bridge.Mr. Smeewarns Hook the bridge can't support the combined weight of all them and the rock, but Hook refuses to listen and send them all tumbling down into Crocodile Creek. As Hook learns that he is the lair of his most feared nemesis he wanted to get out as fast as he can but he notices that his hat is missing and demands that his crew find it.Sharkyuncovers a crown that Hook wasn't impressed by untilBonesrevealed that the crown is the legendaryCrocodile Crownsaid to make its wearer king of the crocodiles. Hook refused to believe just by wearing the crown will give him control over those ravenous reptiles. SuddenlyTick-Tock the Crocodileemerges from the creek with the Brown Crocodile andNile Crocodileattempting to devour Hook and his crew. However, before the crocs could take a bite they freeze after spotting the Crocodile Crown on top of Hook's head much to Hook's surprise. Captain Hook couldn't believe his eyes and ordered the crocodiles to perform various tricks which they all did successfully. Marveling at the sight of the crocs following his commands without any backtalk and there combined might he felt that he didn't need Smee, Sharky and Bones any longer and soon turned the crocodiles upon his old crew. Later Hook is seen upon a throne constructed by the crocodiles as he amuses himself making Tick-Tock juggle for him. Smee, Sharky, and Bones soon returned with Jake who tries to reason with Hook warning him the danger that Tick-Tock and the other crocodiles are only serving him do to the power of the crown and are dangerous. Hook refuses to listen and orders the crocodiles into herding Jake, Smee, Sharky and Bones into a wooden cage locking them up. Hook soon gloats and informs the pirates with the combined might of his new subjects he will now attempt to retrieve the most dangerous treasure on the island the treasure ofCaptain Catastrophe. characters.name: Buccaneer Barnacles
characters.description: Buccaneer BarnaclesBackground informationFirst Appearance"A Bad Case of the Barnacles!"VoiceRussi TaylorCharacter informationAffiliationsNeutralGoalTo find a ship to call homeHomeNever SeaAlliesEach otherLikesAttaching themselves to ships and causing them to sail out of controlDislikesThe sweet smell of the Zebra RoseFateLast seen on the hall of theJolly RogerQuoteGiggles[Source] TheBuccaneer Barnaclesare minor characters from theDisney Junioranimated series,Jake and the Never Land Pirates. Their vocal effects are provided by the lateRussi Taylor. Buccaneer Barnacles are mischievous inhabitants of theNever Sea. Unlike other species of barnacles, that can be scraped off a ship, Buccaneer Barnacles refuse to leave a vessel they call home. They also display the power to cause a ship to sail wildly out of control as long as they remain attached, as seen with both Bucky and later theJolly Roger. The only known means of removing the barnacles from a ship is the sweet scent of theZebra Rose, which only grows inRose Valleylocated onCrimson Isle. It causes them to sneeze uncontrollably when in contact with the flower scent.

characters.name: Buddybops
characters.description: The BuddybopsBackground informationFirst Appearance"Treasure Tunnel Trouble"VoiceDee Bradley BakerCharacter informationOther namesFlubby bugs (referred to by Captain Hook)Floppydops (referred to by Captain Hook)Bugaboos (referred to by Captain Hook)Buddybumps (referred to by Captain Hook)Bullyboops (referred to by Captain Hook)Boppityblob (referred to by Captain Hook)Boopyscoopers (referred to by Captain Hook)AffiliationsGoodHomeNever LandAlliesBaron Buddybop,Bones,Jake,Izzy,Cubby,Skully,EnemiesCaptain Hook,Mr. Smee,SharkyLikesPlaying Buddybop Ball,  protecting the golden Buddybop treasureDislikesCaptain Hook[Source] TheBuddybopsare minor characters in theDisney Junioranimated seriesJake and the Never Land Pirates. They are a group of short anthropomorphic mammalian like creatures that inhabitant a subterranean net work of tunnels withinNever Land. Their vocal effects are provided byDee Bradley Baker. The Buddybops first appeared in the episode "Treasure Tunnel Trouble",Captain Hooksoon learns thatBoneshas been taking a break from his pirate task aboard theJolly Rogerin favor of playing withJakeand his crew and the Buddybops on Never Land. Furious at this Hook was determined to put end to Bones foolishness but soon learns that Buddybops have a hoard of golden orbs within their underground home. Knowing Bones wouldn't have the heart to betray his Never Land friends Hook allowed Bone to play with Jake and his crew and the Buddybops as a distraction allowing Hook,SmeeandSharkyto raid theBuddybops' Treasure Burrow. However, Bones soon become aware of his captain dirty trick and with the assistance of theBaron BuddybopBones, Jake and his crew journey into the Buddybops lair to put a stop to it.

characters.name: Bumble Guards
characters.description: Bumble GuardsBackground informationFirst Appearance"Follow the Bouncing Bumble!"VoiceDee Bradley BakerCharacter informationOccupationThe Bouncing Bumble Queen's guardsAffiliationsGoodGoalTo protect the queenTo keep the Bumble Bungalow safeHomeThe Bumble BungalowinBig Bug ValleyAlliesBouncing Bumble Queen,Bouncer the Bouncy Bumble,Bouncy Bumbles,Jake,Izzy,Cubby,SkullyEnemiesCaptain Hook,Mr. Smee,Sharky,BonesLikesPraise from there queenDislikesTreats to the hive, traitors, thieves, law-breakersWeaponsStingers[Source] TheBumble Guardsare minor characters from theDisney Junioranimated series,Jake and the Never Land Pirates. They serve as both theBouncing Bumble Queen's bodyguards and as theBumble Bungalow's police force. Their vocal effects are provided byDee Bradley Baker. The Bumble Guards first appeared in "Follow the Bouncing Bumble!" While on a treasure hunt throughBig Bug ValleyCaptain Hookand his crew discover the Bouncy Bumbles hive and tried to retrieve what treasure lies within but were forced to flee when the queen's guards cast them out. Not one to give up a treasure hunt Captain Hook and his crew disguise them self to try and steal their treasure. The disguises seem to fool the guards allowing Hook and his men access into the hive but a young Bouncing Bumble later namedBouncerwasn't fooled by Hook and his crew and rush to find help when he meetsJakeand his crew who agreed to help stop Hook.
